dataset.name: UNISA Diplomas for Chamu
dataset.important_note: Current application status must be fetched separately because open and closed statuses change.

global_rules.selection: Meeting minimum requirements does not guarantee admission.
global_rules.annual_registration_limit: Many UNISA diplomas limit students to 120 credits or 10 modules per academic year.

programmes.name: Diploma in Law
programmes.purpose: Develops foundational and applied legal knowledge for primary legal services and support roles.

admission.required_endorsement: Diploma endorsement or an accepted equivalent admission route
admission.language_requirement: Programme-specific language requirement applies; verify the current official page
alternative_routes: Relevant Higher Certificate, subject to UNISA rules
Senior Certificate satisfying diploma admission rules

funding.note: Subject to current NSFAS eligibility and UNISA registration rules.

evaluate_in_order: Confirm diploma endorsement or a recognised alternative route
Calculate the UNISA APS
Check language of teaching and learning
Check Mathematics versus Mathematical Literacy rules
Check qualification-specific alternative-entry routes
Check current application availability
Use manual_review where a threshold is not explicitly verified
do_not_assume: APS alone guarantees admission
Mathematical Literacy is accepted unless explicitly stated
A qualification is currently open merely because it exists in the catalogue

data_quality.identity_and_code: verified against current official UNISA listings
data_quality.admission_requirements: confirmed where explicitly available; otherwise marked for manual review
